verbs: May the Force be with you... you'll need it
I am your father... of all these bugs
Do or do not... mostly do not
These aren't the droids you're looking for... but nothing is
I've got a bad feeling about this... as usual
The Force is strong with this one... everything else, not so much
It's a trap!... as predicted
Never tell me the odds... they're terrible anyway
Help me, Obi-Wan... you're my only hope... that's a low bar
Use the Force, Luke... nothing else is working
I am the Senate... of broken pipelines
This is where the fun begins... said no one ever
In my experience, luck doesn't exist... just suffering
Great, kid. Don't get cocky... it only goes downhill
Chewie, we're home... unfortunately
Stay on target... despite everything
The Dark Side clouds everything... including the docs
Judge me by my size, do you?... judge me by my error count
Punch it!... it won't help
I find your lack of faith disturbing... in the process
Strike me down... I'll just come back as a regression
The circle is now complete... of disappointment
I know... it's bad
Hello there... another production incident
Your focus determines your reality... and reality is grim
